allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 5; where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null)
